title: Eva Neufeld
compiled_truth: Eva Neufeld is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-03 to 2001-12-21), Eva Neufeld sent 13 and received 76 emails, totalling 89 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (13), [Shonnie Daniel](people/shonnie-daniel) (11), [Janet Place](people/janet-place) (8), [Paul Miller](people/paul-miller) (6), [Robert Hill](people/robert-hill) (5).
